final:
module clock_gating(
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire [1:0] data_in,
    output reg [1:0] data_out
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data_out <= ~data_in;
    end
  end

endmodule
